name: @clipy/cli
description: Command-line interface for Clipy — list, search, and read your screen recordings' transcripts, AI summaries, and key moments from the terminal.

scripts.test:auth: npm run build && node scripts/mock-auth-server.test.mjs && node scripts/doctor.test.mjs
scripts.test:session: npm run build && node scripts/auth-guard.test.mjs && node scripts/session-control.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:auth && npm run test:session
